description: Opt-in PostToolUse reminder that fires after files are written/edited, nudging you to run the formatter, linter, and type-check. Advisory only (never blocks). Copy the `hooks` block into .claude/settings.json to activate. To make it auto-run tools, replace the echo with your project's format/lint commands (keep the trailing `exit 0` so it stays non-blocking).

hooks.command: echo '[post-edit-check] File changed. Run the project formatter, linter, and type-check before review (see .claude/skills/testing/SKILL.md and .claude/checklists/qa.md).' >&2; exit 0
